The plant is classified within the genus Acinodendron, which is a group of flowering plants known for their showy flowers and unique growth habits. Acinodendron neurotrichum is closely related to other species within the family Melastomataceae, such as the genera Tococa and Miconia. The classification of Acinodendron neurotrichum reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants in the Melastomataceae family.
